title: Sun Shader Extension
description: Allows Resource Pack creators to have a different sun texture for each dimension (works with shaders!)
body:
# Sun Shader Extension
This is a very simple one-mixin mod that allows Resource Pack creators to have a sun texture for every dimension they have the sun enabled in. 

## How do I use the mod?

To utilise this mods capabilities, name the files sun_NAMESPACE_DIMENSION.png. in the example below the NAMESPACE is bracken (see [The Bracken Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/the-bracken-pack)) and the DIMENSION is "pax"

![an example folder layout for this mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da12db03502b6f2faacabf8af6484f06b92b1ec9.png)

with this mod enabled, with shaders enabled, you will render the correct sun in the correct dimension, if a sun icon is unavaible for a given dimension it will just default to the minecraft sun.
